campaign: C2 — Triage lifecycle + proposal-gate seal (+ backlog-age alert)

phases.title: triage data model + state-machine core
phases.outcome: NOTE_TRIAGE_OUTCOMES + noteSchema triage fields; migration 0025 (6 notes cols + sourceNoteId on proposals/tasks, inline-FK-in-ALTER form); assertOpen + exported applyTriage (no event in P1); shared 466 / server 1404 green; FK SET-NULL verified

phases.title: dismiss endpoint + authz
phases.outcome: dismiss(id,actor,reason) reusing applyTriage; authz=author-or-human (403 FORBIDDEN, before open-check); NOTE_DISMISSED + eventToAction 'dismissed'; route-local noteSchema gained 6 triage fields (GET/list/create now expose them as null); POST /notes/{id}/dismiss; 1414 server tests green

phases.title: promote-to-proposal + provenance
phases.outcome: promoteToProposal (early open-guard prevents orphan proposal, no authz gate=elevates signal, reuses proposalService.create w/ optional sourceNoteId); bidirectional provenance (proposal.sourceNoteId<->note.promotedProposalId); NOTE_PROMOTED; POST /notes/{id}/promote-to-proposal {data,proposal}; 1426 server tests green

phases.title: promote-to-task (human-gated) + structural invariant
phases.outcome: promoteToTask HUMAN-only gate (before assertOpen, zero writes on 403); taskService.create extended w/ optional sourceNoteId (undefined-actor skips autonomy guardrail); WIRE-SEALED invariant test proves POST /tasks & /proposals strip client sourceNoteId (Zod) so no AI path forges note->task/epic provenance; 1445 server tests green

phases.title: backlog-age alert
phases.outcome: notes_alert_state latch (migration 0026) + computeNotesHealth (openCount + oldest-untriaged age, NaN-guarded) cloning claims-health idiom; NOTE_BACKLOG_ALERT edge-triggered (fire once >threshold, re-arm on drain) SSE + Discord (identity-masked, NOTE-2 non-fatal); 7d constant threshold; GET /projects/{id}/notes/health; shared 466 / server 1455 green

phases.title: MCP triage tools
phases.outcome: pm_dismiss_note + pm_promote_note_to_proposal (promote-to-task NOT exposed — human-only); api-client dismissNote (apiRequest) + promoteNoteToProposal (bespoke fetch preserves proposal sibling); MCP 154 tests; full suite 10/10 green. Executor implemented+verified but stopped before commit; commander ran gates + committed.
